ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "username" TEXT /* User's chosen username */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "user_last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "is_newsletter_subscribed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is subscribed to the newsletter */,
  "last_ip_address" TEXT /* Last IP address used by the user */,
  "last_user_agent" TEXT /* Last user agent string */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session started */,
  "session_size" INTEGER /* Number of interactions in the session */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session ended */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address used during the session */,
  "is_first_session" INTEGER /* Indicates if it is the user's first session */,
  "session_source" TEXT /* Source of the session (e.g., direct, search engine) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clicks" (
  "click_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each click event */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session during which the click occurred */,
  "click_article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article clicked */,
  "click_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the click event */,
  "click_environment" INTEGER /* Environment where the click occurred (e.g., web, app) */,
  "click_device_group" INTEGER /* Device group used (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "click_os" INTEGER /* Operating system used */,
  "click_country" INTEGER /* Country of the user */,
  "click_region" INTEGER /* Region of the user */,
  "click_referrer_type" INTEGER /* Referrer type (e.g., direct, search engine) */,
  "click_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the click event */,
  "click_depth" REAL /* Depth of the click (e.g., how far into the article the user scrolled) */,
  "click_engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score for the click */,
  "click_share_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the article was shared from this click */,
  "click_comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments made from this click */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("click_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clicks_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clicks_click_country FOREIGN KEY ("click_country") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clicks_click_environment FOREIGN KEY ("click_environment") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clicks_click_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("click_article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clicks_click_referrer_type FOREIGN KEY ("click_referrer_type") REFERENCES referrer_types ("referrer_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clicks_click_region FOREIGN KEY ("click_region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clicks_click_device_group FOREIGN KEY ("click_device_group") REFERENCES device_groups ("device_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clicks_click_os FOREIGN KEY ("click_os") REFERENCES operating_systems ("os_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the article */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the article belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the article (e.g., published, draft) */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Word count of the article */,
  "reading_time_minutes" INTEGER /* Estimated reading time in minutes */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the article is featured */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the article is behind a paywall */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Total number of shares for the article */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Total number of comments for the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information of the author */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the author registered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the author (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Author's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Author's gender */,
  "is_staff_writer" INTEGER /* Indicates if the author is a staff writer */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the author's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_groups" (
  "device_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device group */,
  "device_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the device group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operating_systems" (
  "os_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operating system */,
  "os_name" TEXT /* Name of the operating system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operating system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("os_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the region belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referrer_types" (
  "referrer_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referrer type */,
  "referrer_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the referrer type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the referrer type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referrer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the profile */,
  "total_sessions" INTEGER /* Total number of sessions the user has had */,
  "total_clicks" INTEGER /* Total number of clicks the user has made */,
  "preferred_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred category of articles */,
  "preferred_environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred environment */,
  "preferred_device_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred device group */,
  "preferred_os_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred operating system */,
  "preferred_country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred country */,
  "preferred_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred region */,
  "preferred_referrer_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred referrer type */,
  "total_share_count" INTEGER /* Total number of shares made by the user */,
  "total_comment_count" INTEGER /* Total number of comments made by the user */,
  "average_session_duration" REAL /* Average duration of the user's sessions */,
  "average_click_depth" REAL /* Average depth of clicks made by the user */,
  "average_engagement_score" REAL /* Average engagement score for the user's clicks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_preferred_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_preferred_device_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_device_group_id") REFERENCES device_groups ("device_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_preferred_referrer_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_referrer_type_id") REFERENCES referrer_types ("referrer_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_preferred_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_preferred_os_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_os_id") REFERENCES operating_systems ("os_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_preferred_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_preferred_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_performance" (
  "content_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content performance record */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "total_clicks" INTEGER /* Total number of clicks the article has received */,
  "average_session_duration" REAL /* Average duration of sessions where the article was clicked */,
  "click_through_rate" REAL /* Click-through rate of the article */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score based on user interactions */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Total number of shares for the article */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Total number of comments for the article */,
  "average_click_depth" REAL /* Average depth of clicks for the article */,
  "average_engagement_score" REAL /* Average engagement score for the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_performance_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)
